---
name: Technical Spike
about: Research or investigation task
title: '[SPIKE] '
labels: 'type: spike, role: technical-architect'
assignees: ''
---

## Research Question
[What do we need to investigate or understand?]

## Context
[Why is this research needed? What problem are we trying to solve?]

## Background
[Provide context about the current situation or problem domain]

## Goals
What we aim to achieve through this spike:
- [ ] Goal 1 (e.g., Evaluate feasible solutions)
- [ ] Goal 2 (e.g., Identify technical risks)
- [ ] Goal 3 (e.g., Create proof of concept)

## Timeboxed Effort
**Maximum time:** [e.g., "4 hours", "1 day", "2 days"]
⏰ **Do not exceed this time.** Report findings even if incomplete.

## Research Areas
1. **Area 1:** [e.g., Database scaling options]
2. **Area 2:** [e.g., Performance comparison]
3. **Area 3:** [e.g., Cost analysis]

## Success Criteria
How we know this spike is complete:
- [ ] Questions answered with data/evidence
- [ ] Recommendations documented with rationale
- [ ] Findings presented to team
- [ ] Decision can be made based on findings

## Deliverables
- [ ] Technical note document in `docs/technical-notes/[spike-name].md`
- [ ] Architecture Decision Record (ADR) if decision made
- [ ] Proof of concept code (if applicable)
- [ ] Presentation slides or summary (if needed)

## Research Methods
How this research will be conducted:
- [ ] Literature review (documentation, articles, RFCs)
- [ ] Prototyping / proof of concept
- [ ] Performance benchmarking
- [ ] Expert consultation
- [ ] Comparative analysis of options

## Options to Evaluate
| Option | Pros | Cons | Estimated Effort | Notes |
|--------|------|------|------------------|-------|
| Option 1 | | | | |
| Option 2 | | | | |
| Option 3 | | | | |

## Related
- **User Story:** #[issue-number] (if applicable)
- **Epic/Feature:** [Description]
- **Related Spikes:** #[issue-number]

## Findings
[To be filled during/after research]

### Summary
[Brief summary of findings]

### Recommended Approach
[What is recommended and why]

### Trade-offs
[Explicit trade-offs of the recommendation]

### Next Steps
[What should happen after this spike]

---

**Output Location:** `docs/technical-notes/[spike-name].md`
**Assignee:** @technical-architect (or assign to appropriate role)
**Reminder:** Timebox this work. Report findings even if research is incomplete.
